summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FitBeats iteration 9 features: Profile page, Class Mode, mobile responsive fix, and add-songs-to-playlist dialog. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/auth/profile returns user profile with user_id, email, name, role (no password_hash)
PUT /api/auth/profile with {name:'New Name'} updates name successfully
PUT /api/auth/profile with empty name returns 400
Profile endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
POST /api/class-sessions creates a new class session with tracks, custom_duration, transition types
GET /api/class-sessions returns user's sessions
GET /api/class-sessions/{id} returns session detail
PUT /api/class-sessions/{id} updates session name and transition_duration
DELETE /api/class-sessions/{id} deletes session (returns 404 on subsequent GET)
Class session endpoints require authentication
Instructor user can access songs at /songs (regression - non-admin access)
Instructor can search Spotify (regression)
Instructor can access their profile
Instructor can create class sessions
Spotify search works for admin (regression)
Frontend /profile page shows user info, Spotify connect button, role badge (Administrador/Instructor), logout button
Frontend user dropdown menu has 'Mi Perfil' link
Frontend /class-mode page shows session list or empty state with 'Crear mi primera clase' button
Frontend class editor: can set class name, add songs from mixes and Spotify, set custom duration per track, choose transition type
Frontend /songs mobile view (390px) shows readable track names (e.g., 'TABATA- Push to start f...' not 'T...')
Frontend mobile songs view uses flex layout instead of grid
Frontend playlist detail has '+' button that opens add songs dialog with Mixes and Spotify tabs
Frontend add songs dialog shows mixes with 'Agregar' buttons
seed_data_creation: Created instructor user 'instructor@test.com' / 'Test1234!' for testing non-admin access. Test class sessions are cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile endpoints (GET/PUT /api/auth/profile) work correctly. Class session CRUD endpoints work with tracks containing custom_duration (seconds) and transition types (crossfade, cut, fade_out, fade_in). Mobile songs view at 390px width shows readable track names using flex layout. Playlist detail view has add songs dialog with Mixes and Spotify tabs. Instructor users can access songs, Spotify search, profile, and class mode.
